title: verbascum × humnickii subsp. germanum
intro: Verbascum × humnickii subsp. germanum, also known as German Mulein or German Mullein, is a biennial plant that belongs to the figwort family and is native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × humnickii subsp. germanum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and reduce pain. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and topical creams, and is often used to support respiratory health and promote relaxation.
